title: BEM-851 reask Claude approval
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:27 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem850_route_extracted_blocker.json')
proof=Path('governance/protocols/BEM851_PROTOCOL_APPROVAL_EVIDENCE.md')
proof.write_text('# BEM-851 | Protocol Approval Evidence Package'+sep+sep+'–Ē–į—ā–į: '+created+sep+sep+'## Evidence paths'+sep+sep+'| Proof | Path |'+sep+'|---|---|'+sep+'| Dispatch result verification | `governance/state/bem843_verify_after_bem842_tick.json` |'+sep+'| Runtime/response verification | `governance/state/bem845_process_or_reverify_after_bem844.json` |'+sep+'| Real Claude response draft | `governance/protocols/BEM845_CLAUDE_AGREED_PROTOCOL_DRAFT.md` |'+sep+'| Human-readable protocol | `governance/protocols/BEM846_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md` |'+sep+'| Blocker repair plan | `governance/protocols/BEM850_BLOCKER_REPAIR_PLAN.md` |'+sep+sep+'## Repair statement'+sep+sep+'The protocol now explicitly requires triad proof: workflow dispatch result, Claude runtime state, and real Claude response. Blocker/fallback files are excluded from approval evidence.'+sep)
req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem851_reapproval_request.md')
req.write_text('# BEM-851 | RE-APPROVAL REQUEST'+sep+sep+'–Ē–į—ā–į: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: review BEM851 evidence package and BEM846 protocol after blocker repair. Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem851_claude_reapproval_response.md. Include exact marker `Claude Internal Auditor` and exact line `Decision: APPROVED`, `Decision: CHANGE_REQUIRED`, or `Decision: BLOCKED`. If BLOCKED/CHANGE_REQUIRED, list concrete required changes. No issue comments. Do not expose secrets.'+sep)
q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem851_claude_reapproval_dispatch.json')
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-851 re-request Claude approval after blocker repair evidence package','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-851','status':'blocker_repair_applied_and_reapproval_queued','route_status':route.get('status'),'evidence_package':str(proof),'request':str(req),'queue':str(q),'next_action':'fresh tick then verify Claude reapproval response','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem851_apply_blocker_repair_and_reask_claude.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem851_apply_blocker_repair_and_reask_claude.md').write_text('# BEM-851 | Apply Blocker Repair And Reask Claude | QUEUED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick then verify Claude reapproval response. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-851'+sep+sep+'Status: blocker repair applied and reapproval queued'+sep+'Next: fresh tick then verify Claude reapproval response'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(proof),str(req),str(q),'governance/state/bem851_apply_blocker_repair_and_reask_claude.json','governance/reports/bem851_apply_blocker_repair_and_reask_claude.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem851_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Applied blocker repair by creating an evidence package and queued Claude re-approval request')
